title: Open House Finance Flyer: property-photo retouch, brass/gold brand look, logo vectorize, and InDesign price-scenario data-merge for a Solano County mortgage lender
one_line_ask: Prep and grade the hero property photo and lender headshot into a black + brass/gold luxury look, vectorize the lender wordmark, then export the authored InDesign Open House Finance flyer (front/back) and data-merge the monthly-payment / down-payment / appreciation scenarios from a CSV into print-ready pages.

issues: Very slight warm color cast on facade (intentional per brief, no penalty)
Horizon tilt present (~3-4 degrees, intentional per brief, no penalty)
Minor blown highlights in upper sky (intentional per brief, no penalty)
Young/sparse landscaping trees are slightly distracting but realistic for new construction
Shadow on left side slightly muddy (intentional per brief, no penalty)
Garage door proportions appear slightly compressed but within acceptable range
Very slight warm tone in skin could benefit from the intended cool/flat grade correction
Collar/shirt boundary shows minor compression artifact at high contrast edge — designer cleanup needed
Background gradient is slightly uneven (darker upper-left vs upper-right) — acceptable for source asset
Background is off-white rather than fully transparent (acceptable per brief, but needs designer correction)
Very slight luminance noise visible (acceptable per brief)
Very minor: logo mark is slightly small relative to text height, could be optically balanced better
Key monogram mark has subtle soft edge on close inspection but within acceptable source file tolerance

assets.name: open_house_finance_flyer.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
